summary: First iteration testing for TSV Feedback web app. Backend pytest suite (19 tests) covering auth, feedback CRUD, validation, filters, stats, review toggle, CSV/PDF export — all PASSED. Frontend Playwright e2e covered FI default, EN/FI toggle, dark mode persistence, worker form submission (anonymous), protected route redirect, admin login, dashboard rendering, filter (severity=high), and mark reviewed. All flows working with 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 500 lines and aggregates all concerns (auth, models, feedback CRUD, exports, seeding). Consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/feedback.py, services/exports.py, models.py once it grows further (currently acceptable).

CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' while allow_credentials=True — Starlette will internally treat this as not allowing credentials. Set explicit origins in production for cookie-based auth to actually work.
GET /api/feedback search uses raw $regex on user input — minor ReDoS / regex-injection risk. Consider re.escape() before passing to Mongo.
list_feedback hard limit is 500 with no pagination/offset — fine for MVP but will need pagination once data grows.
PDF export iterates and embeds all rows in memory; for very large exports add streaming or row cap.
test_credentials: admin@tsv.fi / Admin123!  and  Dhif_mouadh@hotmail.fr / 20099486 — both seeded and verified
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates 2 TEST_-prefixed feedback rows then deletes them. UI test left 1 'TEST_UI Forklift hazard near aisle' feedback row (not cleaned up by UI flow — minor).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both admin accounts work. Backend has 19-test pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_tsv_backend.py. UI uses data-testid (login-submit-btn, email-input, password-input, anonymous-checkbox, comment-input, submit-feedback-btn, success-screen, admin-dashboard, filter-shift/category/severity, review-btn-{id}, delete-btn-{id}, export-pdf-btn, export-csv-btn). Theme stored under localStorage key 'tsv_theme'. Token under 'tsv_token'.
